TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mongolia, title = Mongolia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mongolia} }

S.FORM: Mongolia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 46 00 N, 105 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,564,116 sq km (maki' tay 19ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,553,556 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10,560 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 3,031,330. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 73% , lhlahuy hya' ga 7%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ulaanbaatar. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 11 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Mongolia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 46 00 N, 105 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,564,116 sq km (maki' tay 19ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,553,556 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10,560 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 3,031,330. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 73% , lhlahuy hya' ga 7%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ulaanbaatar. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 11 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: moŋolia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ulaanβaatar. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mpituʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ts~ɕakħiaɣiin elβeɣ*orj, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
